index
6. CITE-seq多模态分析

多模态分析: 分析从同一细胞中同时测量多种数据类型
CITE-seq (Cellular Indexing of Transcriptomes and Epitopes by sequencing): 从同一单个细胞中同时测量转录组和蛋白质
抗体测序标签(Antibody-derived Tags, ADTs): CITE-seq使用与细胞表明特定蛋白质结合的抗体，这些抗体被修饰为带有独特的DNA标签。这些DNA标签为每种蛋白质提供了一个独特的序列。

Weighted Nearest Neighbors (WNN) 方法的应用，该方法允许基于两种模态的加权组合同时对细胞进行聚类

分析了8,617个脐带血单个核细胞 (CBMCs)的数据集，其中转录组测量与11种表面蛋白的丰度估计相匹配，这些蛋白质的水平是用DNA条形码抗体来定量的。
这个数据集大约5%的小鼠细胞
数据加载

library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(patchwork)

cbmc.rna <- read.csv(file = "./data/GSE100866_CBMC_8K_13AB_10X-RNA_umi.csv.gz", sep = ",", header = TRUE, row.names = 1) %>% as.sparse()
# 这个数据集包含小鼠和人类2个数据集, 分别以HUMAN_和MOUSE_为前缀, 下面的函数会见前100个最高表达的小鼠基因保留, 并去除HUMAN_和MOUSE_前缀
# 这样做只是为了减小数据集, 方便分析演示
cbmc.rna <- CollapseSpeciesExpressionMatrix(cbmc.rna)
cbmc.adt <- read.csv(file = "./data/GSE100866_CBMC_8K_13AB_10X-ADT_umi.csv.gz", sep = ",", header = TRUE, row.names = 1) %>% as.sparse()

# 确定细胞barcode是否匹配
all.equal(colnames(cbmc.rna), colnames(cbmc.adt))
# [1] TRUE

cbmc <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = cbmc.rna)
adt_assay <- CreateAssayObject(counts = cbmc.adt)
cbmc[["ADT"]] <- adt_assay

Assays(cbmc)
# [1] "RNA" "ADT"

rownames(cbmc[["ADT"]])
 # [1] "CD3"    "CD4"    "CD8"    "CD45RA" "CD56"   "CD16"   "CD10"   "CD11c"  "CD14"   "CD19"   "CD34"   "CCR5"   "CCR7"
DefaultAssay(cbmc)
# [1] "RNA"

# 可以使用DefaultAssay切换默认Assay数据集
DefaultAssay(cbmc) <- "ADT"

预处理和聚类
...

cbmc <- NormalizeData(cbmc)
cbmc <- FindVariableFeatures(cbmc)
cbmc <- ScaleData(cbmc)
cbmc <- RunPCA(cbmc, verbose = FALSE)
cbmc <- FindNeighbors(cbmc, dims = 1:30)
cbmc <- FindClusters(cbmc, resolution = 0.8, verbose = FALSE)
cbmc <- RunUMAP(cbmc, dims = 1:30)
DimPlot(cbmc, label = TRUE)

多种模式同时可视化
...

从scRNA-seq剖析中获得了cluster，可以在数据集中可视化蛋白质或RNA分子的表达。
同一特征可能存在于多种模式中 - 例如，此数据集包含了B细胞标记CD19的独立测量值（蛋白质和RNA水平都有）。

cbmc <- NormalizeData(cbmc, normalization.method = "CLR", margin = 2, assay = "ADT")
#或
DefaultAssay(cbmc) <- "ADT"
cbmc <- NormalizeData(cbmc, normalization.method = "CLR", margin = 2)
DefaultAssay(cbmc) <- "RNA"

DefaultAssay(cbmc) <- "ADT"
p1 <- FeaturePlot(cbmc, "CD19", cols = c("lightgrey", "darkgreen")) + ggtitle("CD19 protein")
DefaultAssay(cbmc) <- "RNA"
p2 <- FeaturePlot(cbmc, "CD19") + ggtitle("CD19 RNA")
p1 | p2

# 可以直接使用前缀指定feature, 效果同上
p1 <- FeaturePlot(cbmc, "adt_CD19", cols = c("lightgrey", "darkgreen")) + ggtitle("CD19 protein")
p2 <- FeaturePlot(cbmc, "rna_CD19") + ggtitle("CD19 RNA")
p1 | p2

# Key函数可以查询Assay的前缀
Key(cbmc[["RNA"]])
# [1] "rna_"
Key(cbmc[["ADT"]])
# [1] "adt_"


VlnPlot(cbmc, "adt_CD19")

cluster 6高表达ADT CD19蛋白

查看cluster 6的其他蛋白质和RNA

adt_markers <- FindMarkers(cbmc, ident.1 = 6, assay = "ADT")
rna_markers <- FindMarkers(cbmc, ident.1 = 6, assay = "RNA")


head(adt_markers)
               # p_val avg_log2FC pct.1 pct.2     p_val_adj
# CD19   2.067533e-215  1.2787751     1     1 2.687793e-214
# CD45RA 8.106076e-109  0.4117172     1     1 1.053790e-107
# CD4    1.123162e-107 -0.7255977     1     1 1.460110e-106
# CD14   7.212876e-106 -0.5060496     1     1 9.376739e-105
# CD3     1.639633e-87 -0.6565471     1     1  2.131523e-86
# CD8     1.042859e-17 -0.3001131     1     1  1.355716e-16
> head(rna_markers)
      # p_val avg_log2FC pct.1 pct.2 p_val_adj
# BANK1     0   1.963277 0.456 0.015         0
# CD19      0   1.563124 0.351 0.004         0
# CD22      0   1.503809 0.284 0.007         0
# CD79A     0   4.177162 0.965 0.045         0
# CD79B     0   3.774579 0.944 0.089         0
# FCRL1     0   1.188813 0.222 0.002         0

FeatureScatter函数绘制2个特征的表达情况

FeatureScatter(cbmc, feature1 = "adt_CD19", feature2 = "adt_CD3", slot = "data")

加载10X 多模态数据
...

pbmc_10k_protein_v3 -Datasets -Single Cell Gene Expression -Official 10x Genomics Support

pbmc10k.data <- Read10X(data.dir = "./data/pbmc_10k_protein_v3_filtered_feature_bc_matrix/filtered_feature_bc_matrix")
pbmc10k.data[["Antibody Capture"]] %>% rownames()
 # [1] "CD3_TotalSeqB"           "CD4_TotalSeqB"           "CD8a_TotalSeqB"          "CD14_TotalSeqB"          "CD15_TotalSeqB"         
 # [6] "CD16_TotalSeqB"          "CD56_TotalSeqB"          "CD19_TotalSeqB"          "CD25_TotalSeqB"          "CD45RA_TotalSeqB"       
# [11] "CD45RO_TotalSeqB"        "PD-1_TotalSeqB"          "TIGIT_TotalSeqB"         "CD127_TotalSeqB"         "IgG2a_control_TotalSeqB"
# [16] "IgG1_control_TotalSeqB"  "IgG2b_control_TotalSeqB"

pbmc10k.data[["Gene Expression"]] %>% rownames() %>% head()
# [1] "MIR1302-2HG" "FAM138A"     "OR4F5"       "AL627309.1"  "AL627309.3"  "AL627309.2"

# 把Antibody Capture中的后缀去掉
original_row_name  <-  pbmc10k.data[["Antibody Capture"]] %>% rownames()
replace_row_name <-  gsub(pattern = "_[control_]*TotalSeqB", replacement = "", x = original_row_name)
rownames(pbmc10k.data[["Antibody Capture") <- replace_row_name

pbmc10k <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = pbmc10k.data[["Gene Expression"]], min.cells = 3, min.features = 200)
pbmc10k <- NormalizeData(pbmc10k)

pbmc10k[["ADT"]] <- CreateAssayObject(pbmc10k.data[["Antibody Capture"]][, colnames(pbmc10k)])    # [, colnames(pbmc10k)]保证细胞的顺序一致
pbmc10k <- NormalizeData(pbmc10k, assay = "ADT", normalization.method = "CLR")
